title: Genesys Cloud announces general availability of conversation summarisation
summary: Genesys today announced general availability of AI-powered conversation summarisation across all Genesys Cloud CX tiers. The feature uses an in-house fine-tuned model and produces a structured summary of every voice and digital interaction at wrap-up time.

title: Release notes — May 2026: New workforce-management forecasting model
summary: The May 2026 release introduces a redesigned WFM forecasting model based on intraday seasonality decomposition. The new model is now the default for new tenants; existing tenants can opt in via Admin > Workforce Management > Forecasting > Engine.

title: Beta — Bring Your Own Model (BYOM) for AI summarisation
summary: Beta programme open for customers wishing to plug in an external LLM (OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure OpenAI) for summarisation. Requires a connected provider in Admin > AI > Providers and an opt-in per queue. Beta availability EMEA + US; APAC follows in Q3 2026.

title: Roadmap discussion — when will the new outbound campaign builder ship?
summary: Genesys PM responds in-thread that the redesigned outbound campaign builder is targeted for GA in Q4 2026 with an opt-in beta opening Q3 2026. No confirmed feature parity with the legacy builder at GA — voice and SMS first, email later.

title: Genesys Q1 results: cloud ARR up 22% year-on-year
summary: Genesys reported first-quarter 2026 financial results showing cloud ARR growth of 22% year-on-year, with strength in EMEA mid-market. Vendor cited momentum from AI summarisation and workforce engagement management lines.

title: Anyone else seeing the May update break custom screen-pop scripts?
summary: score=42, comments=18 — several practitioners reporting that the May 2026 update broke custom screen-pop scripts relying on the legacy interaction event payload. No vendor acknowledgement yet.

title: Genesys + Snowflake announce native data-share integration
summary: General availability of native Snowflake data share for interaction analytics. Lets customers query Genesys interaction data directly from their Snowflake account without ETL. Available on all CX tiers; usage-based pricing.

title: Rumour — Genesys evaluating acquisition target in the agent assist space
summary: Anonymous community post claiming Genesys is in late-stage acquisition talks with an unnamed agent-assist vendor. No corroboration from vendor newsroom; one analyst quoted as 'no comment'.

title: Deprecation notice — Legacy reporting API v1 sunset 2026-08-01
summary: Legacy reporting API v1 will be sunset on 2026-08-01. Customers must migrate to v3 by that date. v2 was deprecated 2024. Migration guide published; PS engagement recommended for tenants with custom reporting integrations.

title: Genesys appoints new EMEA VP for mid-market
summary: Genesys announced the appointment of a new VP for EMEA mid-market sales. The hire signals continued investment in mid-market segment following Q4 2025 reorg. Previous role at Five9.

title: Genesys vs NICE — what are people actually using for WFM in 2026?
summary: score=87, comments=41 — practitioner sentiment thread comparing Genesys Cloud WFM with NICE IEX. Mixed feedback; users report Genesys WFM has closed the gap on forecasting but NICE still leads on intra-day adjustments.

title: Genesys announces planned Q3 release of conversational analytics dashboard refresh
summary: Vendor pre-announces a major refresh of the conversational analytics dashboard slated for Q3 2026. New visualisations for sentiment trends, topic clustering, and agent-level outcome attribution. Closed-beta opens June 2026; GA Q3.
